CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Importance_of_Deal__c ) = 'None or limited importance to relevant evaluators',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Importance_of_Deal__c ) = 'Deal has support from the relevant evaluators and meets customer requirements',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Importance_of_Deal__c ) = 'Deal meets significant customer requirements and has support among decision makers',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Importance_of_Deal__c ) = 'Critical importance to customer and required approvals to proceed have been secured',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Importance_of_Deal
